meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Learn to leverage user onboarding flows to isolate errors and ship faster with Antigravity and Claude Code tools.
content.answer_block: Debugging failures often stem from unconstrained user inputs and lack of observability. By implementing a structured, state-machine-driven onboarding flow, you force users into validated paths. This isolates logic, eliminates 'ghost' states, and allows Claude Code to pinpoint the exact failure point in your codebase with precision.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is pinging you on Slack, and your terminal is bleeding red errors that defy logic. You’re staring at a broken feature, unable to trace the root cause because the user journey is a chaotic web of unhandled edge cases. It’s the freelance nightmare: being stuck in a loop of 'fix one, break two'.

But the best engineers don't just debug code; they design systems that make bugs impossible to hide. By pivoting to a robust, modular user onboarding architecture, you turn your application into a testable, predictable flow. We are going to use Antigravity to visualize your state machine and Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting, ensuring your next shipment is bulletproof.

steps.title: Map the User Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Define every possible state of your user flow to ensure no hidden transitions exist. This eliminates ambiguity that leads to un-debuggable code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a state machine diagram for a SaaS user onboarding flow including states for 'Email Verification', 'Profile Setup', 'Feature Selection', and 'Dashboard Initialization'. Include error handling transitions for each state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate the state machine logic in TypeScript based on the Antigravity diagram'

steps.title: Implement Zod-based Input Validation
steps.description: Don't let bad data hit your backend logic. Validate inputs at the edge of the onboarding flow to catch errors before they propagate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Zod schemas for a multi-step onboarding form including email, company size, and feature preferences. Ensure strict type inference.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Apply Zod schemas to the existing onboarding form components and handle validation errors'

steps.title: Inject Observability Hooks
steps.description: Add telemetry to your onboarding steps so that when a user hits a 'can't debug' scenario, you have a breadcrumb trail of their actions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware pattern for tracking user progress through onboarding steps and logging state transitions to a console or monitoring service.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Refactor the onboarding flow to include logging middleware for every state transition'

steps.title: Automate Failure Scenario Testing
steps.description: Force your app to fail in controlled ways to verify that your error boundaries catch the issues rather than crashing the process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write test cases for the onboarding flow that simulate invalid data inputs and interrupted network connections.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate unit tests for the onboarding controller to ensure all failure modes are handled'

steps.title: Final Integration & Code Review
steps.description: Use AI to audit the entire flow for architectural bottlenecks that could lead to future debugging headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for potential race conditions or state inconsistencies in the onboarding logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Perform a final audit of the onboarding module and optimize performance'

pro_tips: Always use a 'Context Provider' for onboarding state rather than passing props through five layers of components.
Implement a 'rollback' mechanism in your state machine so users don't get stuck in a broken step.
Use feature flags to roll out new onboarding steps to 10% of users first to catch bugs early.
If you can't debug it, serialize the entire state object to the console; 90% of bugs are hidden in the object structure.
Treat your onboarding flow as a public API; version it so you don't break existing user data when updating.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment and use Claude Code to run automated regression tests against your new state machine logic.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start building systems that scale. We’ve helped hundreds of freelancers reclaim their time and ship projects that clients actually love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
